item.title: Beyond SOTA: What Agent-Memory Benchmarks Actually Measure — and What They Miss
item.description: A comprehensive survey of agent-memory benchmarks: from LoCoMo and LongMemEval to PersonaMem, covering evaluation methodology, metrics, and data synthesis pipelines across conversational memory, user profiling, and multimodal memory.

item.title: The Hardest Part of AI Transformation Isn't AI — It's the Dirty Work Nobody Wants to Do
item.description: Why AI transformation stalls after model selection: dirty data, undocumented workflows, integration debt, evaluation gaps, and organizational resistance are the real bottlenecks.

item.title: From Agent Trajectory to Agent Skill: How to Turn Experience into Compounding Returns
item.description: How to convert agent trajectories into reusable skills through extraction, validation, deduplication, evaluation, and continuous optimization.

item.title: On Agent Harness: A Minimalist Design Guide for AI Agent Harnesses in 2026
item.description: A practical 2026 guide to the minimum architecture of an AI agent harness: loops, tools, filesystems, context management, memory, subagents, and observability.

item.title: About
item.description:
About Me

  • Post-modern human
  • AI practitioner and lifelong learner
  • Work enthusiast
  • World explorer
  • INFJ
  • Reading, listening, creating

Welcome to my personal blog!
